description_long: This is a pair of brown leather lace-up boots with a classic, utilitarian design. The boots feature a high ankle shaft, reinforced stitching, and a series of metallic eyelets for the laces. The leather surface has a slightly matte finish with subtle creases and natural texture, suggesting durability and comfort. The soles are flat and appear to be made of a dense, dark rubber or synthetic material, providing traction and support. The boots have a rounded toe and a structured heel, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The interior is not fully visible, but the opening suggests a soft lining for added comfort.
description: A pair of brown leather lace-up boots with high ankle shafts, metallic eyelets, and flat rubber soles. The boots have a classic, rugged appearance with a matte finish and reinforced stitching.
description_view_0: Front view showing both boots with rounded toes, laces, and metallic eyelets clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the high ankle shaft, reinforced stitching, and the profile of the flat sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back seams, heel structure, and the open top of the boots.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, with the lacing and side stitching visible.
